> [!TIP]
> **Open as Draft first.** CI runs automatically when you open a PR — draft keeps reviewers from being pinged until you're ready. If checks fail, go to the **Checks** tab on this PR to see what went wrong. Fix it, push again, and CI will re-run automatically.
